title: Sales Customer Service
excerpt: What is the fastest way to contact monday? Is there customer chat section so i can ask and receive an answer in real-time?

posts.author: consultant (consultant)
posts.cookedHtml: What is the fastest way to contact monday? Is there customer chat section so i can ask and receive an answer in real-time?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @consultant

Welcome to the Community!

The fastest way to get in touch with us is via our support team, who can be reached via support@monday.com.
We don’t currently offer a live chat support option, but our support team are available 24/7 and do tend to answer quite efficiently!

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi again @consultant!

It look like the previous post here might have answered your question, is that correct?

If so, please don’t forget to mark it as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Dani

posts.author: cvenegas (Corina Venegas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’ve reached out to support@monday.com several times in last two months. I am still waiting to receive a response. Can someone please help?

Thanks so much!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @cvenegas - we at Polished Geek are a certified partner with monday, perhaps we can help? Feel free to reach out to me at deb@polishedgeek.com and I’ll be happy to see if I can assist, whether it’s a sales question or product support.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cvenegas

Sorry to hear you’ve been having issues contacting our support team.
Our emails can sometimes get routed to the spam folder so I wonder if you could take a look here?
If not, please feel free to reach out via a private message with your email address so we can continue to look into this!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
